zh.brands:
奢华美妆部门 (Prestige)
Gucci Beauty 古驰美妆 (高级时装奢华传承)Chloé 蔻依 (展现女性化、浪漫与波西米亚风格)Burberry Beauty 博柏利美妆 (英伦经典与现代洗练)Hugo Boss 雨果博斯 (现代职场精英的优雅风范)Calvin Klein 卡尔文克雷恩 (极简主义、前卫与无性别主义先锋)
大众美妆部门 (Consumer Beauty)
CoverGirl 封面女郎 (高性价比、包容性强的大众彩妆)Rimmel London 芮谜 (带有伦敦街头叛逆感的彩妆文化)Sally Hansen 莎莉汉森 (全球指甲护理与色彩知名品牌)Adidas 阿迪达斯 (主打运动活力的身体护理与香氛系列)
zh.perfumes:
Chloé 同名女士淡香精 (Chloé Eau de Parfum)

香调大马士革玫瑰、牡丹、小苍兰、木兰、雪松、琥珀
包装设计复古褶皱玻璃瓶身，独特的真银镀层瓶颈，手工系上的罗缎丝带

CK One 中性淡香水 (Calvin Klein)

香调佛手柑、小豆蔻、菠萝、木瓜、绿茶、茉莉、麝香、琥珀
包装设计极致极简的磨砂玻璃酒瓶造型，可拆卸铝制螺丝帽，配有金属喷头

Gucci 绮梦栀子女士香水 (Flora Gorgeous Gardenia)

香调梨花、白栀子花、鸡蛋花、广藿香、红糖
包装设计修长的粉红色漆面玻璃瓶，精致金色瓶盖，经典的Flora花卉图腾

Boss 自信男士淡香水 (Boss Bottled)

香调苹果、佛手柑、肉桂、丁香、天竺葵、檀香、雪松、香根草
包装设计纯粹干练的圆柱状玻璃瓶身，凹凸工艺刻印的粗体品牌标志，拉丝金属触感瓶盖
zh.competitors:
欧莱雅高档美妆部门 (L'Oréal Luxe)

YSL 圣罗兰自由之水 (Libre)

香调薰衣草、柑橘、橙花、茉莉、马达加斯加香草、麝香
包装设计锋利几何切割瓶身，横向超大金属 YSL Cassandre 标志镶嵌于玻璃之上，配有金色链条

Lancôme 兰蔻美丽人生 (La Vie Est Belle)

香调黑加仑、梨、鸢尾花、茉莉、橙花、果仁糖、香草、广藿香
包装设计厚重的方形玻璃瓶底，内部勾勒出圆润的“水晶微笑”弧度，瓶颈系有灰色欧根纱双翼
LVMH 路威酩轩集团

Dior 迪奥旷野男士香水 (Sauvage)

香调卡拉布里亚佛手柑、四川花椒、薰衣草、降龙涎香醚、雪松
包装设计质感沉稳的深蓝至墨黑渐变漆面圆柱玻璃瓶，带有CD家族磁吸式瓶盖

Chanel 香奈儿五号 (N°5 - 独立奢侈品牌竞争者)

香调醛香、依兰、橙花、五月玫瑰、茉莉、檀香、波旁香草
包装设计极具建筑美感的祖母绿切割极简方形玻璃瓶，八角形瓶盖致敬巴黎芳登广场的几何轮廓
雅诗兰黛集团 (Estée Lauder Companies)

Tom Ford 午夜兰花 (Black Orchid)

香调黑松露、依兰、黑兰花、广藿香、焚香、香草、黑巧克力
包装设计富有装饰艺术(Art Deco)风格的黑色垂直罗纹玻璃瓶，手工系有刻字金色铭牌线圈

en.brands:
Prestige (Luxury)
Gucci Beauty (High fashion heritage)Chloé (Feminine, romantic, bohemian)Burberry Beauty (British classic refinement)Hugo Boss (Modern corporate elegance)Calvin Klein (Minimalist, provocative, gender-neutral)
Consumer Beauty (Mass Market)
CoverGirl (Accessible, inclusive makeup)Rimmel London (Edgy, street-style cosmetic culture)Sally Hansen (Nail care and color leader)Adidas (Sport-active body and fragrance care)
en.perfumes:
Chloé Eau de Parfum

NotesDamascena rose, peony, freesia, magnolia, cedarwood, amber
PackagingVintage-inspired fluted glass bottle, genuine silver-plated collar, hand-tied grosgrain ribbon

CK One (Calvin Klein)

NotesBergamot, cardamom, pineapple, papaya, green tea, jasmine, musk, amber
PackagingUltra-minimalist frosted glass flask bottle, removable screw cap, metallic spray atomizer

Gucci Flora Gorgeous Gardenia

NotesPear blossom, white gardenia, frangipani, patchouli, brown sugar
PackagingElongated pink lacquered glass bottle, shiny gold cap, iconic Flora pattern artwork

Boss Bottled (Hugo Boss)

NotesApple, bergamot, cinnamon, clove, geranium, sandalwood, cedarwood, vetiver
PackagingClean cylindrical glass flacon, embossed block-letter logo, brushed metallic cap
en.competitors:

YSL Libre

Lancôme La Vie Est Belle

NotesBlackcurrant, pear, iris, jasmine, orange blossom, praline, vanilla, patchouli

Dior Sauvage

NotesReggio Calabria bergamot, Sichuan pepper, lavender, ambroxan, cedar
PackagingHeavy dark blue-to-black lacquered glass cylinder, magnetic CD-monogrammed cap

Chanel No. 5 (Independent Competitor)

NotesAldehydes, ylang-ylang, neroli, May rose, jasmine, sandalwood, bourbon vanilla
PackagingArchitectural emerald-cut minimalist glass bottle, octagonal stopper mimicking Place Vendôme
Estée Lauder Companies

Tom Ford Black Orchid

NotesBlack truffle, ylang-ylang, black orchid, patchouli, incense, vanilla, dark chocolate
PackagingArt Deco-inspired ribbed black glass bottle, hand-tied gold cord with engraved plate
